arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Frankfurt – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur entertain Eintracht Frankfurt tonight in the first leg of their Europa League quarter-final. Ange Postecoglou’s future as Spurs manager could hinge on whether he can end the club’s 17-year trophy drought this season. With the Lilywhites languishing in 14th position in the Premier League, this competition is the only remaining avenue for success. arts.ttl: Manager ‘immediately jumps to 2nd place’ for Tottenham – Belief Ange almost out, and €15m could be saved
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are thinking about Thiago Motta as one of the options to replace Ange Postecoglou, according to Tuttosport. Spurs endured a poor run in the Premier League this season, losing more than 50% [16] of the 31 league games. They collected 37 points so far and are now 14th in the table.
